notes: Allow local preview origins on the CORS Worker (localhost / LAN)
Amber session title in the header matching nav label weight
Tighter SG Y-axis pad; tick labels use true data min/mid/max
Always fetch up to 28 days of readings; WINDOW (DAYS) is analysis-only
Full / Window chart toggle for full ferment vs analysis span
Fix archived-session fetch: page from created_at, keep last 28 days
Optional blue temperature overlay with left Y-axis and F/C toggle
Optional SG Temp Compensate (correct to 68 F; chart + FG analysis)
Draggable analysis window on Full (move body; left handle resizes 1-6 days and syncs SETTINGS)
Fix chart text/dot/stroke scale after full-width layout -- viewBox now matches rendered pixel size so elements stay page-scale
Re-render chart on window resize so the viewBox stays accurate
Initial release
just checking
Initial public release.
SG trend chart plus FG stability analysis lifted from the FermVault Brain dashboard; analyzer output is byte-for-byte identical.
Sessions tab lists your recent Brewer's Friend sessions; click one to load.
Settings tab: API key entry (stored in localStorage) plus FG analyzer knobs (tolerance, window days, max outliers, min readings, stale hours).
Retrospective analysis works: fetch window anchors on the last-reading timestamp so archived ferments load their tail instead of an empty 'today - N days' window.
DATA STALE banner suppressed for archived sessions (newest reading over 24 h old); still fires for actively-monitored ferments where staleness indicates a sensor problem.
One-line FG status bar above a full-width trend chart; FG diagnostics panel below.
Cloudflare Worker CORS proxy; API key never leaves the browser except through the proxy and the proxy does not log or persist it.
Open Graph card image and social meta tags for clean link previews.
